parameters.jsonBody: ={ "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 500, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "Generate a professional yard care quote for TotalGuard Yard Care (Madison WI). Details: Service={{ $json.service }}, Property size={{ $json.property_size }} (sm=<5k sqft, med=5-15k, lg=15-30k, xl=30k+), Type={{ $json.property_type }}, Frequency={{ $json.frequency }}, Notes={{ $json.notes }}. Pricing reference: Lawn mowing sm=$35-45, med=$45-65, lg=$65-95, xl=$95-150. Spring/fall cleanup: 1.5x mowing price. Snow removal: $50-150/visit by driveway size. Gutter cleaning: $100-200. Hardscaping: $500-5000+. Return JSON: { \"line_items\": [{\"service\": \"...\", \"description\": \"...\", \"price_low\": 0, \"price_high\": 0}], \"total_low\": 0, \"total_high\": 0, \"notes\": \"...\" }" }] }

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, quote_id: $('Extract Quote').first().json.quote_id, estimate: $('Extract Quote').first().json.quote }) }}
